{{CargoRelic
|name=Thursday Star
|class_id=20532
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Fortune Law 5: Seize the last day of every event. Without giving it your all, you will never know the extent of your luck's potential!
|fame=16
|art=14
|fth=13
|civ=31
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail HP +10<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail HP +20<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail HP +30<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail HP +30<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss7=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail HP +30<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400<br> (Awakened)
}}
